member.summary: Get pricelist assignment by outer id

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.PricingModule.Web.Controllers.Api.PricingModuleController.GetNewPricelistAssignments
member.remarks: Get a new pricelist assignment object. Create new pricelist assignment, but does not save one.

member.remarks: Get all pricelists for all catalogs.

member.remarks: Search price list assignments by given criteria

member.remarks: Get an array of valid product prices for each currency.

member.summary: Evaluate product prices for demand catalog
member.remarks: Get an array of valid product prices for each currency.

member.summary: Get all price lists for product
member.remarks: Get all price lists for given product.

member.name: M:VirtoCommerce.PricingModule.Web.Controllers.Api.PricingModuleController.GetPriceListInShortById(System.String)
member.summary: Get pricelist in short mode (without assignments to avoid redundant assignments read)

member.summary: Get pricelist by outer id in short mode (without assignments)

member.remarks: Delete pricelist assignment by given array of ids.

member.remarks: Delete pricelist assignments by given criteria.

member.summary: Delete all prices for specified product in specified price list

member.remarks: Delete pricelists by given array of pricelist ids.

member.summary: Merge base and priority price list and returns MergedPriceGroup.

member.summary: Merge base and priority price list and returns MergedPrice.

member.summary: Partial update for the specified ProductPrice by id
